_patch_meta.description: Phase 7 verse routing for M46. CC-aligned from AI v1 patch (WA-M46-patch-phase7-routing-v1-20260515.json). Eight technical defects in v1 were corrected without disturbing the reading-grounded routing decisions. See outputs/markdown/m46-phase7-patch-alignment-v1-20260515.md and Sessions/Session_Clusters/M46/WA-M46-cc-response-to-phase7-patch-v1-20260515.md for the full audit trail.

cc_alignment_notes.anchor_strategy: Existing anchors preserved except where AI explicitly designated 7 new anchor ops (per AI's _patch_meta.description: 'Anchors set where designated'). set_is_anchor field omitted from non-anchor ops.
cc_alignment_notes.vr_id_corrections: 57 ops had vr_id corrected via (reference, mti_term_id) lookup. Original AI patch used verse_context.id values where verse_record_id was expected.
cc_alignment_notes.h7600_additions: 4 H7600 sha.a.nan verses added per AI's instruction in v1 notes (CC to identify 413-002 verses) and pattern extrapolation: Isa 32:9, Isa 32:11, Isa 37:29 -> M46-A gid=1861; Isa 32:18 -> M46-D gid=1862.
cc_alignment_notes.orphan_inserts_split: 2 truly-orphan ops (Neh 9:25, Neh 9:35 for sha.men adj mti=4695) split into companion VCNEW patch WA-M46-patch-phase7-newverses-v3-20260515.json.
cc_alignment_notes.liparos_term_move: Term G3045 liparos moved from M46-A to M46-B via mti_term_subgroup UPDATE before patch apply (separate inline operation, not part of this patch). Required because AI's reading routes Rev 18:14 to M46-B.
cc_alignment_notes.anchor_preservation_for_isa_32_18: Isa 32:18 H7600 retained is_anchor=1 (existing) — patch op does not modify is_anchor.
cc_alignment_notes.hon_retargeting_applied: 4 hon (H1952 mti=7010) ops retarget Psa 112:3 / Psa 119:14 / Pro 11:4 / Pro 28:22 from group_id=2933 to specific content-aligned VCGs (3711/3716/3717/2957). AI's generic 'preserve existing group_id' note overridden by reading-grounded explicit ops.

ai_input_intent_summary.description: Phase 7 verse routing — derived from reading every verse in wa-M46-verse-readings-v1-20260514.md. Every routing decision is grounded in the recorded reading of that specific verse. Sets cluster_subgroup_id and group_id for all relevant (G and P status) verses. Anchors set where designated.
notes: VCREVISE applies to all rows regardless of current status. CC: if a row already has a group_id, preserve it and only update cluster_subgroup_id where missing. If group_id is NULL, set both.
Some verses appear twice with different mti_ids (same verse, different cluster terms). Each (vr_id, mti_id) pair is a distinct verse_context row and is routed independently.
sha.a.nan 413-002 verses (divine secure quietness → M46-D, group_id=1862): CC to identify these from the sha.a.nan per-term section and route them to M46-D + VCG 1862.
liparos (G3045, vr_id=64258, Rev 18:14): routed to M46-B + VCG 3709 (ploutos choking/deceiving force). Basis: soul longed for luxurious goods — insatiability face.
9 UT borderline verses remain unrouted — pending researcher decision. Not included in this patch.

Pro 15:30 (da.shen) routed to M46-D VCG 3708 (ptōchos-003 giving/release/enrichment) — basis: good news enriches bones; received blessing rather than character-produced wealth. This is correct per the reading.
Pro 3:9 (hon — honor Lord with wealth) routed to M46-D VCG 3715 (plousiōs divine provision) — the act of directing wealth toward God; M46-D ordering face.

1Ti 6:17 has three terms (plousios, plousiōs, ploutos) each with their own vc row — routed individually: plousios→M46-A (haughtiness/misplaced hope), plousiōs→M46-D (divine provision), ploutos→M46-A (uncertain riches as disqualified hope).

operations._routing_basis: Bringing blessing enriches — generosity produces enrichment; character→wealth

Trust in the Lord produces enrichment vs. greed producing strife — character→wealth
Good news refreshes the bones — received blessing as inner-physical renewal; D not C because it names received gift not character-produced
Grown fat → turned to other gods — prosperity-apostasy mechanism; same VCG as sha.men verb
Great iniquity and great hatred — magnitude of inner moral failure
Multitude of sacrifices — abundance of ritual without inner reality

Greatness of God's might — magnitude setting context for human dependence

Many sorceries — rov as the quantity trusted in that cannot save

Greatness of God's strength — magnitude of divine salvific action
Abundance of his steadfast love — magnitude of divine faithfulness as anchor for human inner person
Greatness of your iniquity — magnitude of moral failure as cause of suffering
Guilt is great — weight of guilt as ground of judgment
Guilt is great — same pattern as Jer 30:14
Hard servitude — magnitude of imposed suffering crushing inner condition
Multitude of transgressions — accumulated covenant violations as ground of judgment
Abundance of steadfast love — rov of divine faithfulness greater than rov of transgression

More fruit increased more altars — rov naming proportional unfaithfulness with prosperity

Multitude of your warriors — military abundance as object of displaced trust
Countless whorings — magnitude of spiritual prostitution as ground of judgment
Made all my bones shake — totality of inner-physical terror response
Greatness of his power — magnitude of divine power that does not crush the petitioner
Continual strife in bones — rov of sustained inner-physical suffering
Multitude of oppressions — rov of external suffering producing inner cry
Abundant righteousness — magnitude of divine righteousness as ground of just governance
Multitude of words — verbal abundance as substitute for moral justification; rov names the abundance-as-problem
Woe to those at ease in Zion — complacent ease produced by material-political security
Nations at ease — divine anger at self-generated complacency
Contempt for misfortune from the at-ease person
Scorn of those at ease — sha.a.nan producing contempt toward the oppressed
Complacency has come into my ears — Assyria's inner ground of arrogance against God
Lives in luxury, food is rich — self-attributed military success producing inner idolatry of own power
Rich land → ate → fat → delighted then turned — sha.men adj names the ambient condition before apostasy
Rich land God gave — context of disobedience; sha.men names the provision within which faithfulness was owed
Rich and plenteous bread — eschatological divine provision; restoration context → M46-C ordered face
ANCHOR M46-A. Make heart fat/dull — judicial hardening; fat heart = closed heart
Jeshurun grew fat and kicked — prototypical prosperity-apostasy sequence
Grown fat and sleek → no bounds in evil, no justice for fatherless — fatness producing moral insensibility
Became fat (sha.men verb) → delighted then turned — sha.men verb in prosperity-apostasy sequence
Stout warriors struck with wasting — human robustness/fatness as what judgment reduces
Fat flesh of Jacob growing lean — material prosperity stripped by judgment
With difficulty will a rich person enter the kingdom — wealth as inner obstacle
Camel through eye of needle — the inner obstacle of wealth to kingdom entry
Woe to you who are rich — consolation fully received in this age; inner satisfaction exhausted here
Rich man feasting daily — daily self-indulgence while Lazarus lies at gate; hardness
Lazarus desired scraps from rich man's table — indifference scale; hardness toward neighbor
Rich man died — eschatological reversal of the hardness pattern
Became very sad for he was extremely rich — wealth producing grief when kingdom demands; inner obstacle
Camel-needle — kingdom obstacle; same pattern as Mat 19:24
Rich putting gifts in treasury — giving from surplus; moral observation in context of widow's greater gift
Though he was rich yet became poor — Christological reversal; M46-D
Charge rich not to be haughty nor set hopes on uncertain riches — twin distortions: pride and misplaced hope
Rich in his humiliation — transience of wealth; fading like grass
Rich man fades in midst of his pursuits — absorbed in accumulation while fading
God chose poor to be rich in faith — kingdom reversal; material poor/rich in faith
Rich oppress and drag into court — wealth enabling structural domination
Weep and howl for miseries coming — prophetic judgment on unjust accumulated wealth
You are poor but you are rich — Smyrna: materially poor, genuinely rich before God

Rich hiding from wrath — wealth provides no exemption
Rich man with dishonest manager — moral category context; wealthy as structural role

Rich among those marked — wealth provides no exemption from allegiance demand
God who richly provides — plousiōs names the abundant quality of divine provision as ground of ordered inner life
